title: CPVP Essentials
description: CPVP Essentials includes all the mods you need for Crystal PvP in one Modpack.
body:
### CPvP Essentials includes all the mods you need for Crystal PvP in one optimized modpack.
### 

All included mods are allowed on **MCTiers, PvPTiers, and almost all Crystal PvP servers,** so you can play competitively without worrying about compatibility or restrictions.

## ⚡ Features
-  FPS optimization mods for smooth and stable performance
-  Crystal and Anchor optimizers
-  Essential utilities for gameplay
